description: A slogan graphic from the Department of Labor. It is a tightly cropped, heavily processed close-up of a man's face (a duotone or halftone treatment in dusty rose-pink over deep navy blue, with a visible printed dot and grain texture and grunge overlay) showing the eyes, nose, and skin in detail. Centered across the middle in a tall, narrow, slightly glowing white condensed sans-serif typeface (a stencil style) is the all-caps slogan 'PATRIOTS IN CONTROL.' There is no other text, logo, or seal visible on the image itself. The accompanying tweet text reads 'Patriots are in control, and we're never giving up our fight to put AMERICA FIRST.'
